description_long: This object consists of two white ceramic cups, each with a rounded body and a single looped handle. The left cup is slightly smaller and features a yellow rectangular artwork with a figure on one side, while the right cup is larger and displays a colorful oval graphic with text and a portrait. Both cups have smooth, glossy surfaces and wide circular openings. The handles are ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The cups are empty, with their interiors appearing clean and unadorned.
description: A pair of white ceramic cups, each with a handle and colorful artwork on the side, featuring smooth, glossy surfaces.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the plain white backs and handles of both cups, with no artwork visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the open tops and handles of both cups, highlighting their size difference and simple design.
description_view_2: Front view showing the plain white fronts of both cups, with no artwork visible.
description_view_3: Artwork side view revealing the colorful graphics and text on each cup, with both handles visible on the right.
